detectors.description:
Reentrancy in InnovationTreasury.depositIdleFunds(uint256) (src/treasury/InnovationTreasury.sol#182-218):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- wethToken.forceApprove(address(aaveWethAdapter),0) (src/treasury/InnovationTreasury.sol#207)
	Balance read before the call:
	- liquidBefore = liquidWethBalance() (src/treasury/InnovationTreasury.sol#187)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- actualDecreaseWeth != amountWeth (src/treasury/InnovationTreasury.sol#211)
		- stale variable `actualDecreaseWeth`
